sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the actual segmentation to understand the grid state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Grid cells ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] >= 9 and n['pixels'] <= 25:
        b = n['boundary']
        rmin, rmax = min(r for r,c in b), max(r for r,c in b)
        cmin, cmax = min(c for r,c in b), max(c for r,c in b)
        if rmin >= 49 and rmax <= 61 and cmin >= 22 and cmax <= 38:
            print(f"  color={n['color']} rows=[{rmin},{rmax}] cols=[{cmin},{cmax}] pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Try painting top-center cell
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 50, 'col': 30}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
